title: No Milk Effect
body:
### Mod Features:
- A QoL mod that removes Milk Bucket effect.

### QNA:
- Will this be backported? Yes, Only if requested.
- Fabric? Most likely.
- Why would this ever be useful? It's for those who think the Milk Bucket is overpowered or for modpacks.
- Can I use in a modpack, video, showcase, etc? Yeah, No need for credits either but I'd love if you do.
